mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_MENU (MENU_CD, MENU_NM, MENU_URL, MENU_DESC, MENU_ORDER, USE_YN, UP_MENU_ID, ICON_CLASS_ID) VALUES (#{menuCd}, #{menuNm}, #{menuUrl}, #{menuDesc}, #{menuOrder}, #{useYn}, NULL, #{iconClassId})
mapper.update: UPDATE mhdb.TB_MENU SET MENU_NM = #{menuNm}, MENU_CD = #{menuCd}, MENU_URL = #{menuUrl}, MENU_DESC = #{menuDesc}, MENU_ORDER = #{menuOrder}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, ICON_CLASS_ID = #{iconClassId} WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId}::integer
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM mhdb.TB_MENU WHERE MENU_ID IN
#{id}::integer
